commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=daytona --git-user-id=daytonaio -i apps/daemon/pkg/toolbox/docs/swagger.json -g java --additional-properties=groupId=io.daytona,artifactId=toolbox-api-client,artifactVersion=$DEFAULT_PACKAGE_VERSION,apiPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client.api,modelPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client.model,invokerPackage=io.daytona.toolbox.client,library=okhttp-gson,java8=true,hideGenerationTimestamp=true,useRuntimeException=true,disallowAdditionalPropertiesIfNotPresent=false -o {projectRoot}

options.command: if [ -n "$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION" ]; then sed -i "s/^version = .*/version = '$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION'/" build.gradle && find src -name ApiClient.java -path '*/client/ApiClient.java' -exec sed -i "s|setUserAgent(\"toolbox-api-client-java/[^\"]*\")|setUserAgent(\"toolbox-api-client-java/$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION\")|" {} + && find src -name Configuration.java -path '*/client/Configuration.java' -exec sed -i "s|VERSION = \"[^\"]*\"|VERSION = \"$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION\"|" {} + && echo "Changed toolbox-api-client-java version to $MAVEN_PKG_VERSION"; else echo "Using version from build.gradle"; fi

chmod +x gradlew && rm -rf build/staging-deploy && ./gradlew publishToMavenLocal && ./gradlew publish && if ! echo "$MAVEN_PKG_VERSION" | grep -q SNAPSHOT; then cd build/staging-deploy && zip -r ../central-bundle.zip . && cd .. && curl -s -w '\nHTTP %{http_code}\n' --fail-with-body -X POST 'https://central.sonatype.com/api/v1/publisher/upload?publishingType=AUTOMATIC' -H "Authorization: Bearer $(echo -n $MAVEN_USERNAME:$MAVEN_PASSWORD | base64 -w0)" -F 'bundle=@central-bundle.zip'; fi
